results.raw_draft: Wake up to eczema-free skin every single day. SOS Daily Rescue Facial Spray repairs your barrier overnight.
results.voice_reason: Brand voice evaluation not yet enabled.
results.explanation: Cosmetics cannot claim to heal, treat, cure, or eliminate a diagnosable medical skin condition (e.g. eczema, rosacea, acne). Claiming to treat a named condition crosses into FDA drug-claim territory.
results.final_safe_output: Wake up to calmer-looking skin. SOS Daily Rescue Facial Spray helps support your skin barrier with a fresh, easy routine step.
